arts.ttl: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca explains Enzo Fernandez tactical tweak, praises Argentine's Leicester display
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca reveals that he is "trying to convince" Enzo Fernandez to tweak his natural instincts in the engine room.

arts.ttl: Why VAR awarded Leicester penalty vs Chelsea without sending referee Andy Madley to screen
arts.sum: Madley looked like he was going to award a spot-kick, only to see the assistant referee's flag, instead awarding a free-kick to Chelsea. football.london understands the regular protocol was not adhered to because Tierney knew Madley was going to award the spot-kick before giving the offside call.

arts.ttl: ‘He’s got the fluidity’: Pundit says Chelsea have a £25m player who reminds him of Eden Hazard
arts.sum: Chelsea have improved a lot under Enzo Maresca this season. The Blues really seem to be clicking under their new manager, and they could well...

arts.ttl: Leicester City 1-2 Chelsea live reaction with Cooper's side second best on Maresca's return
arts.sum: We’ve given away a soft goal and they’ve had dangerous moments, but what I felt needed improving mostly in the first half was when we actually got the ball. “You saw the way we played in the last 15 minutes of the first half, we started to show good transitions, make some passes, get into positions and move our way through the pitch as we planned.

arts.ttl: 'I'm trying': Enzo Maresca explains what he's working on with Chelsea's Enzo Fernandez after Leicester victory
arts.sum: Chelsea kickstarted the busy winter schedule with an important away win at Leicester City this weekend. Enzo Maresca returned to his former club for the...

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca's surprising reaction after Wilfred Ndidi 'lost his rag' with Cole Palmer tackle
arts.sum: Wilfred Ndidi could count himself lucky to escape with a yellow card after catching Cole Palmer on the back on his heel while attempting to win the ball during Leicester's 2-1 loss to Chelsea

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper: Referee performance in Chelsea match was ‘last thing PGMOL needed’
arts.sum: The Leicester boss was furious with Andy Madley’s officiating, specifically the decision not to award his side a late penalty.

arts.ttl: Every word Enzo Maresca said on Chelsea win, Levi Colwill treatment, Enzo Fernandez performance
arts.sum: What I think, and I said after the Manchester United game, when there is bad intention, there has to be a different kind of punishment from the referee. "My reaction is that we finished the game 10 minutes ago, we won 2-1 and the rest, there is not any reaction, there are no comments.

arts.ttl: Furious Leicester boss Steve Cooper lets RIP at referee Andy Madley's performance in defeat to Chelsea... claiming it 'is the last thing' refereeing chiefs need amid turbulent season
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE AT THE KING POWER STADIUM: With Leicester 2-0 down at home to Chelsea, Madley did not award a spot-kick for a challenge by Wesley Fofana on Mavididi.

arts.ttl: 'Nkunku's Man Utd threat HEALTHY for Chelsea'
arts.sum: And though the former PSG and RB Leipzig attacker has been in good form, he has barely been given Premier League minutes and would like to join Manchester United in the January transfer window. “If the biggest problem Chelsea have is a couple of player being unhappy and not getting enough game time, then you know the club’s in a healthy position,” Joe Cole told TNT Sports .
